title: Smoky Chana Masala Casserole
description: A fusion of Indian flavors with a smoky twist, served in a hearty casserole. Fermented notes add depth to this comforting dish.

ingredients.name: Casserolesque spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of cinnamon, cardamom, and cayenne

instructions: 2. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
3. Add the cumin, coriander, and casserolesque spices; sauté for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
4. Add the tofu and sauté for 3-4 minutes, until lightly browned.
5. Add the fermented yogurt, smoky paprika, and salt; stir well to combine.
6. Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes, until the casserole is hot and the flavors have melded.
8. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
